headline: Ross Stores CEO doubles down on change that tests shopper loyalty
summary: Ross Stores has seen stronger consumer demand in recent months as more shoppers hunt for lower prices. In response to this heightened momentum, the company’s CEO is planning to roll out a major in-store change that risks hindering this growth. The first few months of 2026 have been profitable ...
